# bio

```
$ whoami
ishaan — software developer, chicago
```

> I build, break, then photograph what’s left.

I build traffic management systems at [Parsons](https://www.parsons.com/) — DevSecOps pipelines, build systems, and the bug-hunting that happens before anyone files a ticket. Before that interned at [Anchorage Digital](https://www.anchorage.com/) and [Ironclad](https://ironcladapp.com/) on their security teams and got a BS in CS from [Purdue](https://purdue.edu).

## off the clock

Behind a camera — landscapes, portraits, astro, long exposures. `Sony a7IV` + `Sigma zooms`. I shoot for movement and time: anything that asks the shutter to stay open.

Travel when I can. Scuba whenever I’m near the ocean.
